## 🛠️ Type of Change

<!-- Please mark the relevant option with [x] and delete options that are not relevant. -->

- [ ] `bug-fix` (Bug fix)
- [ ] `refactor` (Code reorganization or improvement)
- [ ] `docs` (Documentation changes)
- [ ] `style` (Formatting, spacing, lint fixes - no functional change)
- [ ] `test` (Adding or updating tests)
- [ ] `chore` (Build, dependency, or configurations)

## ✅ PR Checklist

<!-- Please check all items that apply. If not applicable, explain why. -->

- [ ] My branch name follows the convention: `{type}/{JIRA_ID}/summary` (e.g. `feature/PROJ-123/user-auth`)
- [ ] My PR title follows the convention: `{type}(JIRA_ID): summary` (e.g. `feature(PROJ-123): user auth`)
- [ ] I have updated/added documentation accordingly (if applicable).
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my changes on GitHub before requesting review.
